channel.title: lateral root number on funPlantGenes
channel.description: Recent content in lateral root number on funPlantGenes

item.title: Cg1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM5G838324 Gene Symbol: Cg1 Gene Name: Corngrass1 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Furthermore, a target of Cg1 is teosinte glume architecture1 (tga1)1, a gene known to have had a role in the domestication of maize from teosinte.

item.title: LBL1;rgd1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb264310 Gene Symbol: LBL1 rgd1 Gene Name: ragged seedling1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmCKX5;cko5
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb337910 Gene Symbol: ZmCKX5 cko5 ckx5 Gene Name: cytokinin oxidase 5 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmHb77
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb377480 Gene Symbol: ZmHb77 Gene Name: Homeobox-transcription factor 77 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmIAA5;ZmIAA10
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb156910 Gene Symbol: ZmIAA5 ZmIAA10 rum1 iaa13 Gene Name: rootless with undetectable meristems1 Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmLRT
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Zm00001eb248920 Gene Symbol: ZmLRT Gene Name: Genome: Zm-B73-REFERENCE-NAM-5.

item.title: ZmPTF1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G024530 Gene Symbol: ZmPTF1 Gene Name: Pi starvation-induced transcription factor1 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: ZmPTF1, a phosphate starvation-induced basic helix-loop-helix (bHLH) transcription factor, contributes to root development and low-phosphate tolerance in maize.
